mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(BOARD_IDX) AS CNT FROM BOARD
AND LOWER(TITLE) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND LOWER(WRITER) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'

SELECT BOARD_IDX, WRITER, TITLE, CONTENT, HIT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGDATE, BOARD_TYPE FROM BOARD
BOARD_TYPE = #{board_type}
AND LOWER(TITLE) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND LOWER(WRITER) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY BOARD_IDX DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{numOfRows} ROWS ONLY
SELECT BOARD_IDX, WRITER, TITLE, CONTENT, HIT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGDATE, BOARD_TYPE FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_IDX=#{board_idx}
